paragraphs: I make sure software gets shipped. Not demos, not sprints that end with 'we need another sprint' — working software, in the hands of the people who need it, on or before the date agreed.

Delivery leadership is a technical job. I need to understand the system well enough to know when an estimate is wrong, when a dependency will kill the timeline, and when a technical decision is being made for political rather than engineering reasons.

metrics.label: On-time delivery rate across all engagements
Average team velocity improvement through structured practices

deliveries.name: Platform Re-launch
deliveries.scope: Full B2C platform relaunch for a fashion retailer with 8 regional markets
deliveries.outcome: Launched on time across all 8 markets; zero post-launch P1 incidents

deliveries.name: Core Banking Migration
deliveries.scope: Multi-phase data and service migration from legacy banking core to modern SaaS platform
deliveries.outcome: 22-month programme delivered in 19 months; full regulatory compliance maintained

deliveries.name: AI Product Launch
deliveries.scope: End-to-end delivery of an LLM-powered document intelligence product from 0 to GA
deliveries.outcome: GA shipped in 14 weeks; first paying customers within 30 days

deliveries.name: Engineering Org Reset
deliveries.scope: Restructured a 40-person engineering org post-acquisition with duplicate teams and conflicting processes
deliveries.outcome: Reduced team count from 9 to 5 value streams; sprint throughput doubled in 6 months

experience.title: Delivery Lead
bullets: Leads delivery across all active client engagements, owning timelines, dependencies, and stakeholder communication.
Establishes delivery practices for new engagements — team rituals, CI/CD standards, escalation paths.

experience.title: Engineering Programme Manager
bullets: Led delivery of the consumer payments platform modernisation — 12 engineering teams, 24 months, zero downtime.
Defined and rolled out engineering delivery standards across 8 product areas following rapid headcount growth.
Built and managed relationships with key SaaS vendors and external engineering partners.

experience.title: Technical Project Manager
bullets: Delivered digital transformation engagements for clients in financial services and retail.
Managed cross-functional teams of 8–20 across design, engineering, and QA in agile environments.
